narrative:
Warren City 5D (precinct in Trumbull County) has 826 registered voters, with 55.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 9.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 34.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 25.1 percentage points.
